build.beforeBuildCommand: VITE_TAURI=true npm --prefix /Users/yxb/projects/nexus/frontend run build && rm -rf /Users/yxb/projects/nexus/desktop/src-tauri/frontend-dist && mkdir /Users/yxb/projects/nexus/desktop/src-tauri/frontend-dist && cp -R /Users/yxb/projects/nexus/frontend/dist/. /Users/yxb/projects/nexus/desktop/src-tauri/frontend-dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* wss://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob:; frame-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*
